topic: Writing and solving equations from word problems
latex:
A local restaurant is trying out a new points rewards system. You get $13$ points every time you come in for a meal and one point for every dollar you spend.

If Mackenzie got $49$ points the last time she came in for a meal, how much money did she spend?

If Mackenzie got $p$ points the last time she came in for a meal, how much money did she spend?
answer_latex:
Money (in dollars) spent if Mackenzie got 49 points: $\$36$

Money (in dollars) spent if Mackenzie got $p$ points: $p - 13$
